ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the electronic component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  "datasheet_path" TEXT /* File path to the datasheet */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the component was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the component was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated, in review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component to which the specification belongs */,
  "characteristic" TEXT /* Characteristic being measured */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the characteristic */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the characteristic */,
  "typical_value" REAL /* Typical value of the characteristic */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the characteristic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the characteristic */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the specifications were tested */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the specification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the specification was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the specification was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality assurance, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user's information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the component */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the component */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component related to this version */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification related to this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the specification */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes detailing the change made */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES specifications ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
